nasb.text: Now He who supplies seed to the sower and bread for food will supply and multiply your seed for sowing and increase the harvest of your righteousness;

esv.text: He who supplies seed to the sower and bread for food will supply and multiply your seed for sowing and increase the harvest of your righteousness.

cnv.text: 但那賜種子給撒種的，又賜食物給人吃的　神，必定把種子加倍地供給你們，也必增添你們的義果。

ccb.text: 赐农夫种子又赐人粮食的上帝，必加倍赐给你们种子，使你们收获更多仁义的果子，

csbs.text: 供应种子给撒种的，又供应粮食给人吃的那一位，将要供给并增加你们的种子，而且增多你们义行的果子，
